title: MT❯3 and Susan Wortzman ranked in Chambers Litigation Support Guide: e-Discovery – Nationwide – Canada
content:
## MT❯3 and Susan Wortzman ranked in Chambers Litigation Support Guide: e-Discovery – Nationwide – Canada
The Chambers Litigation Support Guide: e-Discovery – Nationwide – Canada has ranked MT❯3 , a division of McCarthy Tétrault, Band 1, and partner, Susan Wortzman , Band 1, in its latest edition, recognizing the innovativeness and expertise of Susan and the MT❯3 team.
As the e-discovery space experiences rapid change, including the standardization of AI and machine learning, Susan and her team stand out for their excellent client service and status as trusted advisors to clients facing unique e-discovery challenges. The team is at the forefront of applying machine learning and novel practice management approaches to the full suite of litigation support services, including in e-discovery, information governance, due diligence, managed document review and digital forensics.
Susan, a partner of the firm and MT❯3 Founder, is a leader in e-discovery and information management. She is a frequent lecturer, presenter, panelist and author on the subjects and is regularly quoted in industry publications and other media. She was the 2023 Program Director for the Osgoode Certificate in e-Discovery, Information Governance and Privacy and has been named a Top 25 Most Influential Lawyer in Canada by Canadian Lawyer Magazine and an AI Visionary by Relativity.
MT❯3 is a fully integrated division of McCarthy Tétrault, specializing in e-Discovery, information governance and digital information management. The team is deeply experienced in leveraging machine learning across a wide range of matters, including litigation, cyber breach responses, audits, and investigations. MT❯3 deploys technology early to analyze data and find critical insights while reducing lawyer review time. The team of lawyers, project managers and technical data analysts ensure the expert application of these technologies and workflows, giving clients a strategic advantage in the management and interpretation of critical information.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Susan Wortzman Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
